evidence_summary: POL-426 corrected autoresearch scoring to load WorkerResultContracts from run state, filter non-worker result artifacts, and detect Foreman packet resends per child. src/POLARIS.md and src/SUMMARY.md were updated to reflect that current behavior, and the POL-425 raw analysis was retained as one-time provenance rather than promoted.
